description: BCC-AGCM4-MR is the fourth-generation upgrade of BCC-AGCM3, which serves as the atmospheric component of the BCC-CSM2-MR model. Its dynamical core retains the spectral framework described in Wu et al. (2008), while the flux-form semi-Lagrangian (FFSL) tracer transport scheme has been adopted to replace the original semi-Lagrangian transport scheme for water vapor, liquid cloud water, and ice cloud water. Relative to its predecessors used in the CMIP6 experiments, the main physical parameterizations in BCC-AGCM4-MR have been updated, including those for cloud microphysics, deep and shallow cumulus convection, boundary layer turbulence, and gravity waves.
references: F.: A modified dynamic framework for atmospheric spectral model and its application
